name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'   # triggers on v1.0.0, v2.1.3, etc.

permissions:
  contents: write  # needed to create releases and upload assets

jobs:
  native:
    name: Build ${{ matrix.label }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            label: linux-x64
            executable: doppio
          - os: macos-latest
            label: macos
            executable: doppio

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        env:
          FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true

      - name: Set up GraalVM
        uses: graalvm/setup-graalvm@v1
        with:
          java-version: '21'
          distribution: 'graalvm-community'
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          cache: 'maven'
          native-image-job-reports: 'true'

      - name: Test and package jar
        run: mvn clean package

      - name: Build native executable
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist/native

          jar=$(ls target/doppio-*.jar | grep -v sources | grep -v javadoc | head -1)
          jarbase=$(basename "$jar" .jar)
          echo "Using jar: $jar"

          native-image \
            --no-fallback \
            -H:+ReportExceptionStackTraces \
            -H:Path=$(pwd)/dist/native \
            -jar "$jar"

          mv "dist/native/$jarbase" "dist/native/${{ matrix.executable }}"
          echo "--- Built files ---"
          ls -lh dist/native/

      - name: Sign executable (macOS)
        if: matrix.os == 'macos-latest'
        run: codesign --sign - --force --verbose dist/native/${{ matrix.executable }}

      - name: Package artifact
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          archive="doppio-${{ matrix.label }}.tar.gz"
          tar -czf "$archive" -C dist/native ${{ matrix.executable }}
          echo "archive=$archive" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"

      - name: Upload to release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          files: ${{ env.archive }}
          generate_release_notes: true  # auto-generates notes from commits
